arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'on the verge' of transfer agreement amid mega bids for Jhon Duran and Ollie Watkins
arts.sum: Al-Nassr are reportedly on the verge of reaching a verbal agreement with Aston Villa over signing Jhon Duran. Then, after assisting Jacob Ramsey in the draw with West Ham last weekend, Watkins reached 100 goal involvements in the fewest Premier League games (169) by any player since Kevin De Bruyne achieved the milestone in 155 matches in July 2020.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal get response from Aston Villa after shock bid made for England international
arts.sum: Arsenals’ hopes of landing Ollie Watkins this January transfer window have been dashed after Aston Villa knocked back their offer, according to Fabrizio Romano. The Daily Mail had broke the news that Gunners boss Mikel Arteta has been a long-time admirer of England international and the club has now made a move for the 29-year-old. arts.ttl: Sources: Villa reject Arsenal bid for Watkins
arts.sum: Aston Villa have rejected a formal offer from Arsenal for Ollie Watkins, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers' class Celtic answer after being told England look down on Scottish football
arts.sum: Now in his second spell at Celtic Park, Rodgers has successfully negotiated the Parkhead club out of the Champions League group stage and is also preparing the Bhoys to face Aston Villa . Brendan Rodgers says the pressure of managing Celtic is unrivalled in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Leverkusen signs midfielder Emiliano Buendia on loan from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen has signed Argentine offensive midfielder Emiliano Buendia on loan from Aston Villa to compensate for the injured Martin Terrier. Aston Villa said the player signed a contract extension before joining Leverkusen on loan.

arts.ttl: Sondre Orjasaeter responds to 'cool' Celtic transfer links
arts.sum: Sondre Orjasaeter has responded to reports linking him with Celtic.

arts.sum: Former Aston Villa midfielder Thomas Hitzlsperger explains why it will take time for them to achieve regular Champions League football.
